top3.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
    -- Base case: top-level containers (not contained in any other packaging)
    SELECT 
        p.id AS root_id,
        p.id AS current_id,
        p.name AS root_name,
        p.name AS current_name,
        0 AS level
    FROM packaging p
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM packaging_relations pr WHERE pr.contains_id = p.id
    )
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: traverse down the hierarchy
    SELECT 
        ph.root_id,
       ...

WITH RECURSIVE packaging_hierarchy AS (
    -- Base case: top-level containers (not contained in any other packaging)
    SELECT 
        p.id AS root_id,
        p.id AS current_id,
        p.name AS root_name,
        p.name AS current_name,
        0 AS level
    FROM packaging p
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM packaging_relations pr WHERE pr.contains_id = p.id
    )
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: traverse down the hierarchy
    SELECT 
        ph.root_id,
       ...

WITH RECURSIVE packaging_tree AS (
    -- Start with top-level packaging (those not contained in any other)
    SELECT 
        p.id AS root_id,
        p.id AS node_id,
        p.name AS root_name,
        p.name AS node_name,
        1 AS depth
    FROM packaging p
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM packaging_relations pr WHERE pr.contains_id = p.id
    )
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Traverse to nested packaging
    SELECT 
        pt.root_id,
        pr.contains_id AS node_id,
   ...
